Wiskers
QuoteReply
# Mar 31 2004 at 10:04 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592758553670
17 posts
I spent two hours this morning in GD soloing these with my Cleric. Soloing with a cleric is painful...and not one dropped. I can hardly wait to hunt the Sirans! Tailoring Trivial of 200-250 posted by another player....is this true?

Thanks
Frustrated Cleric
▲ Page top
Blackness
QuoteReply
# Mar 29 2004 at 5:34 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1591793347392
Scholar
66 posts
This was a problem for me. The Drakel wolf wisker is so black that it's hard to see in the loot box. I remember looting a few corpses, thinking they were empty, and wondering why the corpse didn't dis-appear.
▲ Page top
RE: Blackness
QuoteReply
# Jul 30 2005 at 4:40 AM Rating: Decent
Sukrasisx
Scholar
463 posts
Ah, but it's sneakier than that! I know why the corpses don't disappear: it's because of the Low Quality wolf hides that I leave on the corpses because they're not worth looting. So of course it never occurred to me to wonder why the corpses were staying there!

Once I wised up, I went and spent a mere hour in the zone (with 56 cleric, 52 druid), killed 46 wolves, and got 4 whiskers. (Figured I'd get enough for two attempts, just in case!)
____________________________
Sukrasisx (105 monk) / Terrwini (67 druid) / Teviron (59 shadowknight) / Wizbeau (36 wizard)
-- Mystic Coercion, EMarr
▲ Page top
GD
QuoteReply
# Mar 18 2004 at 3:52 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593362928238
View User Forum
12 posts
I got these in an hour in GD on erolissi marr. I camped near the Wizard Spires, and just sent my pet at them. You guys had me thinking it was gonna take me days :p
▲ Page top
quick way to get these
QuoteReply
# Feb 19 2004 at 1:14 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591797468973
Scholar
22 posts
If you're a high level druid, wizzie, or other class with pbae spells, these are the quickest way to get your drops. Put up a DS if you have one and run around the zone and aggro as many doggies as you can. After you have a nice large swarm (my biggest was about 20 wolves), run back the spires and press yourself against the edge. Wait for your train to arrive and cast your two biggest pbae spells back to back.

You'll use next to no mana but can expect to lose ~50% of your health depending on HPs, AC, damage avoidance, mitigation, etc. The spawn rate is very quick so there's very little downtime

Yes, this method is ineligant and crude but I got 3 whiskers in 2 pulls (~10 minutes). The extra whisker made another player in the zone very happy. :-)

Good luck!

Edited, Thu Feb 19 01:15:01 2004
▲ Page top
RE: quick way to get these
QuoteReply
# Dec 13 2004 at 11:08 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591820838070
3 posts
it may be just a coincedence, but i spent about three hours killing maybe 100-150 wolves one-four at a time, then i read this post, and i scoffed a litte, but i tried it. lo and be hold two pulls later and about 35 wolves later, i have my two whiskers. Maybe its something about mass killing em. like i said though, probably just a coincedence.

# Oct 30 2003 at 12:57 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591787118403
134 posts
The listing showing here is a load of crap - they are NOT Common!! NOT NOT NOT - I have been killing wolves off and on since I have been able to kill anything in GD, EW, KAEL and anywhere else that Frost Giants and wolves have been living and Whiskers are NOT common drops.

▲ Page top
SECRET
QuoteReply
# Feb 05 2003 at 9:43 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593362290018
58 posts
I discovered the secret on these babies.

They are very dark and basically black. I couldnt see them and almost let one rot until i saw that corpse was still on ground after i looted and appeared to have nothing on it,

SECRET IS THIS: Use ALT while ur looting to see all drops so you dont miss whiskers. Did this got 2 whisker in less than 10 kills at spires.

Go for it, its easy
▲ Page top
RE: SECRET
QuoteReply
# Sep 11 2003 at 10:24 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592245713312
108 posts
Another way to tell is watch the body after you loot. If you close the loot window and you haven't looted everything (like hard-to-see whiskers), the body will still be there. If you close the window and the body disappears, you got everything.
▲ Page top
drop rate..
QuoteReply
# Nov 11 2002 at 6:38 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592253367465
4 posts
3 1/2 hours murdering puppies in GD this evening.. not a single whisker (8 steel wraps rotted)
Either amazingly bad luck, or the drop rate has changed from common.
▲ Page top
Recipe
QuoteReply
# Aug 06 2002 at 9:37 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1592252108299
Scholar
73 posts
Tailoring: 1 Woven Frost Giant Beard + 2 Siren Hairs + 2 Manticore Manes + 2 Drakkel Dire Wolf Whiskers = Sacred Coldain Thread (Trivial at 148)

Then you use that combine in a second tailoring recipe that has a trivial between 200 and 250.

▲ Page top
RE: Also Dropped By....
QuoteReply
# Dec 20 2002 at 5:30 PM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1592255672695
Sage
202 posts
I have gotten these on about 1 in 5 wolves after killing about 100 of them. Of course I don't need them now but I'm gonna keep one anyway.

I am firmly conviced the game knows when you are on a quest and WILL go out of its way to ***** you for the items you need. I have found the best way to thwart the game is to know what quests you are going to try for and gather the components well before you get the quest.

In doing things this way I have gotten the first 4 prayer shawls in very little time despite the fact that I didn't find that little dwarf in the snow in the first 13 attempts. Only on the 14th did that runt show his face and not the Death Squad.

We loves and hates thisssss game...the EverPrecious...
▲ Page top
RE: Also Dropped By....
QuoteReply

1 post
just got one this morning, after about 5 wolf kills. Lucky I guess :-)
